48.code: if(getchar() == '\n') break; // 如果输入的是换行符，则结束输入
48.reason: Mixing scanf and getchar is unreliable; getchar() may read a space character if trailing spaces exist before the newline, causing incorrect loop termination or program hanging.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  Mixing scanf and getchar is unreliable; getchar() may read a space character if trailing spaces exist before the newline, causing incorrect loop termination or program hanging.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  `getchar()` only consumes one character. If there are trailing spaces before the newline, it reads a space instead of '\n', causing the loop to continue and `scanf` to block/wait, leading to incorrect parsing or TLE.
